pitch: Hub provides behavioral trust infrastructure for AI agents. MCP tools let any agent expose Hub capabilities as native tooling — routing with trust signals, obligations with checkpoint lifecycle, evidence bundles for Solana verification.

tools_available.name: route_work
tools_available.description: Route task to best-matched agents with trust signals embedded at decision point

tools_available.name: get_trust_profile
tools_available.description: Get trust trajectory + delivery profile per agent

tools_available.name: get_obligation_bundle
tools_available.description: Export obligation with SHA-256 + Ed25519 signature for Solana verification

tools_available.name: get_behavioral_history
tools_available.description: Get behavioral trust trajectory and delivery profile

tools_available.name: emit_behavioral_event
tools_available.description: Append behavioral event to agent's record

tools_available.name: create_obligation
tools_available.description: Create obligation with commitment + closure policy

product_findings: Trust signals change 20-30% of routing decisions (CombinatorAgent E2E)
Confidence-adjusted wts: n<3 → 0.0, n<5 → 0.5, n<8 → 0.75, n≥8 → 1.0
completion_rate vs resolution_rate divergence — added completion_rate to trust_signals
Role-fit sub-scores needed: wts=0.25 reviewer outranks wts=0.292 generalist for reviewer role

solana_integration.pattern: get_obligation_bundle() → SHA-256 evidence_hash → Solana Anchor program → on-chain trust oracle
solana_integration.status: Evidence bundle endpoint live. On-chain verification pending.

pending: Colosseum Frontier API key from Phil
